message:
feat(cli): add --no-migrations flag and startup migration system

Introduce a startup migration framework that runs before config loading:

- src/cli.rs: add --no-migrations flag to Cli struct with known_long_option
  registration, plus unit tests for parse and default-false assertion
- src/main.rs: call pi::migrations::run_startup_migrations(&cwd) when
  --no-migrations is not set, printing any migration messages to stderr
- src/lib.rs: register new pub mod migrations
- src/extensions.rs: remove unnecessary & in pattern match comparison
  (clippy lint fix: &candidate == canonical_primary → candidate ==)

The migration system enables legacy config/session/layout path migrations
to run automatically at startup, with an escape hatch via --no-migrations
for environments where migrations should be deferred or skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
